productDisplayName: W Women Block Print Purple Kurta
description: Composition Purple kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, mandarin collar with a slit neckline, half buttoned placket, woven panel detailing on the chest with metal ring embellishments, block print and vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this classic piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8", chest 33" and waist 26"
